comment: Love the atmospheric feel, really inspiring my current projects
Screwly G's flow is so underrated, been studying his style for weeks
This energy is infectious, perfect blend of aggression and melody
Kyle Richh's collaborations always bring the heat, such a fan of this collective vibe
Young Madz's melodic approach is everything, hits different every time
Kyle's flow is infectious, this vibe is exactly what I've been working on lately
